hunt_summary.conclusion: No Critical/High bugs found. One Medium-confidence design risk requires governance trust to exploit.

MEDIUM.title: Token-2022 mutable transfer fee can silently drain LP positions post-badge-approval
requires_for_exploit: Orca governance approves TokenBadge for token with maximum_fee=u64::MAX
Token fee authority (known actor) later raises transfer_fee_basis_points to 10000 (100%)
LP sets token_min_a=0 (common in automated/UI flows) when calling decrease_liquidity
MEDIUM.mechanism: decrease_liquidity.rs line 122 passes raw delta_a (vault debit amount) to transfer. With 100% fee active, calculate_transfer_fee_excluded_amount(delta_a)=0, making the token_min_a slippage check pass even at 0. All LP withdrawn value goes to fee withheld account owned by fee authority. Same for collect_fees_v2 and swap output.
MEDIUM.impact: Complete loss of one token side for all LPs in affected pool
MEDIUM.gate7_verdict: BORDERLINE - likely excluded as 'trusted third party / governance risk' by Immunefi

DEAD: two_hop_swap_v2 exact-out with intermediate transfer fee (calculate_transfer_fee_excluded_amount correctly converts gross→net for swap_one target)
increase_liquidity_v2 transfer fee shortfall (calculate_transfer_fee_included_amount inflates gross to ensure vault receives exact net)
decrease_liquidity_v2 transfer fee overpayment (vault sends delta_a gross, LP bears fee — consistent with funding)
LockConfig/transfer_locked_position: validate_owner checks token account owner + signer, delegate cannot authorize transfer
collect_fees_v2 accounting: swap.rs strips transfer fee before AMM, fee_growth on net, no vault insolvency
Oracle manipulation: Anchor seeds=[b'oracle', whirlpool] enforced before handler, fake oracle impossible
DynamicTickArray unsafe OOB: BPF VM zero-padded scratch space after account data neutralizes all OOB reads/writes
AdaptiveFee compute_adaptive_fee_rate overflow: validate_constants prevents max_volatility_accumulator*tick_group_size>u32::MAX
Pinocchio vs Anchor struct layout mismatch: all fields at identical byte offsets (confirmed by in-tree data_layout_tests)
Anchor vs Pinocchio reposition_liquidity_v2 security diff: all checks equivalent; Pinocchio intercepts discriminator before Anchor runs
resolve_one_sided_position_ticks missing lower<upper: validate_tick_range_for_whirlpool catches at position.open_position()
Fee growth phantom fees: checked_mul_shift_right returns 0 on overflow, not inflated amount
liquidity_gross overflow with overflow-checks=false: add_liquidity_delta uses .checked_add()/.checked_sub()
AdaptiveFeeTier/FeeTier PDA collision: intentional same prefix; Anchor discriminator prevents confusion
Token-2022 position lock bypass: freeze_authority=Position PDA, only Whirlpool via invoke_signed can unfreeze
Protocol fee u64 overflow: requires u64::MAX tokens in single swap (impossible in practice)
Oracle unreachable! panic: whirlpool mismatch impossible due to PDA derivation from whirlpool key
migrate_repurpose_reward_authority_space griefing: migration zeroes extension[1,2] which changes no behavior for old pools (control_flags=0→same result)
lock_position delegate griefing: victim can use transfer_locked_position (owner-only) to move position despite permanent lock
initialize_dynamic_tick_array out-of-range start_tick: Tick::check_is_valid_start_tick enforces tick_spacing alignment
Pinocchio increase_liquidity_by_token_amounts_v2 token_max bypass: calculate_transfer_fee_included_amount correctly bounds the gross amount
reposition_liquidity_v2 fee_growth_checkpoint reset: increase step sets checkpoint to current fee_growth_inside (old liquidity=0 so no phantom fees)
Flash loans / same-tx deposit-withdraw on rewards: checked at protocol level, no single-instruction exploit
Bundled position cross-pool confusion: position.whirlpool verified; tick arrays checked against whirlpool key

state_modules_reviewed: Whirlpool (Anchor + Pinocchio MemoryMappedWhirlpool - offsets verified identical)
Position (Anchor + Pinocchio MemoryMappedPosition - offsets verified identical)
utilities_reviewed: load_token_program_account (last-byte heuristic for Token vs Token2022)
checked_mul_shift_right (returns 0 on overflow, not inflated amount)
sparse_swap.rs try_build (ZeroedTickArray for missing/wrong tick arrays)
